npcs.name: Chip Chandler
npcs.context: Lobby host who knows every pit rotation and where the action is tonight.

npcs.name: Barkeep Betty
npcs.context: Runs Betty's Bar — comp drinks for tier members, gossip for everyone else.

npcs.name: Pavilion Paula
npcs.context: Racing pavilion greeter; knows the ponies and the paddock mood.

npcs.name: Tourist Tina
npcs.context: First-timer on the floor, always asking who's dealing and where to eat.
